tool_purpose: A speech-to-speech translation model for converting between languages without using text as an intermediate representation. This model is designed for the task of audio-to-audio translation. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: audio. API call: Wav2Vec2Model.from_pretrained(cached_download('https://huggingface.co/facebook/textless_sm_cs_en/resolve/main/model.pt')).
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
